name: Pea-Cheddar Sandwich Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the split peas in water according to package instructions until tender.
2. Drain and rinse the cooked peas.
3. Place the cooked peas, grated cheddar cheese, finely chopped onion, salt, and pepper in a blender.
4. Blend until smooth and creamy.
5. Spread the mixture on sandwiches.
6. Serve warm.
